title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
Compared to previous weeks, the dry bulk market has shown increased strength.The gearless tonnage led the way with few mid aged KMXs and PMXs being sold. On the wet side, following an exceptionally strong start of the year, sales activity moderated. However, overall sentiment remains constructive, supported by continued interest especially in the crude sector.
